sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useRef } from 'react'; import { Package, CheckCircle2, Star, Edit, MapPin, Upload, UserCircle, Briefcase, Mail, Phone, CreditCard, Factory, Info } from 'lucide-react'; import { toast } from 'sonner'; const Profil = () => { const [profileImg, setProfileImg] = useState(null); const fileInputRef = useRef(null); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ namaDepan: 'Budi', namaBelakang: 'Santoso', email: 'budi@ptmajujaya.co.id', phone: '+62 812 3456 7890', perusahaan: 'PT Maju Jaya', jabatan: 'Manajer Logistik', npwp: '01.234.567.8-901.000', industri: 'Manufaktur', alamat: '', kota: 'Bekasi', provinsi: 'Jawa Barat', kodePos: '17520' }); const handleImageUpload = (e) => { const file = e.target.files[0]; if (file) { if (file.size > 2 * 1024 * 1024) { toast.error('Ukuran file maksimal 2MB'); return; } const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onloadend = () => { setProfileImg(reader.result); toast.success('Foto profil berhasil diperbarui'); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } }; const handleEditClick = () => { toast.info('Fitur edit sedang dalam pengembangan'); }; return (
{/* Page Title */}

Profil Saya

{/* Stats Row */}

Total Pesanan

24 pesanan

↗ +3 bulan ini

Berhasil Terkirim

21 kiriman

↗ 87.5% success rate

Bergabung Sejak

2021

3 tahun bersama MPL

{/* Profile Header */}
{profileImg ? ( ) : ( "BS" )}

Budi Santoso

Manajer Logistik • PT Maju Jaya

JPG, PNG maks 2MB

{/* Informasi Pribadi */}

Informasi Pribadi

{formData.namaDepan}
{formData.namaBelakang}
{formData.email}
{formData.phone}
{formData.perusahaan}
{formData.jabatan}
{formData.npwp}
{formData.industri}
{/* Alamat Pengiriman */}

Alamat Pengiriman

{formData.alamat}
{formData.kota}
{formData.provinsi}
{formData.kodePos}
); }; export default Profil;
